allow: Bash(sqlite3 vicara.db "SELECT version, checksum FROM tauri_plugin_sql_migrations ORDER BY version;")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "[Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8; python3 -c ""import sqlite3; conn = sqlite3.connect\(''C:/Users/green/AppData/Roaming/com.vicara.app/vicara.db''\); cur = conn.cursor\(\); cur.execute\(''SELECT version, checksum FROM tauri_plugin_sql_migrations ORDER BY version''\); print\(cur.fetchall\(\)\); conn.close\(\)""")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "[Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8; python3 -c ""import sqlite3; conn = sqlite3.connect\(''C:/Users/green/AppData/Roaming/com.vicara.app/vicara.db''\); cur = conn.cursor\(\); cur.execute\(\\""SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type=''table'' ORDER BY name\\""\); print\(cur.fetchall\(\)\); conn.close\(\)""")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "[Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8; vssadmin list shadows 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern ''Shadow Copy|Creation Time'' | Select-Object -First 10")
